The next Summer Olympics will be held in Paris and the next Winter Olympics will be held in Milan-Cortina.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?summerLocLabel ?winterLocLabel WHERE {
  {
    SELECT ?summerLocLabel WHERE {
      wd:Q159821 wdt:P527 ?editionSum .
      ?editionSum wdt:P276 ?locSum ; wdt:P580 ?dateSum .
      ?locSum rdfs:label ?summerLocLabel .
      FILTER(LANG(?summerLocLabel) = "en")
      FILTER(?dateSum > NOW ())
    }
    ORDER BY ?dateSum
    LIMIT 1
  }
  {
    SELECT ?winterLocLabel WHERE {
      wd:Q82414 wdt:P527 ?editionWin .
      ?editionWin wdt:P276 ?locWin ; wdt:P580 ?dateWin .
      ?locWin rdfs:label ?winterLocLabel .
      FILTER(LANG(?winterLocLabel) = "en")
      FILTER(?dateWin > NOW ())
    }
    ORDER BY ?dateWin
    LIMIT 1
  }
}
```

Using properties:

  - "entity" index (type="fuzzy"): Entities indexed by their labels and synonyms

Index types used:
- "embedding": Retrieves items by cosine similarity between their embeddings and the query embedding. The embedding model used depends on the index and may support text, images, or both.
- "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed.
